channel.title: Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosted on Arrans github.io

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer. Multiple engine support (llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM)

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted
item.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: The best and simplest free open source web page change detection, website watcher, restock monitor and notification service. Restock Monitor, change detection. Designed for simplicity - Simply monitor which websites had a text change for free. Free Open source web page change detection, Website defacement monitoring, Price change notification

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
item.description: List of ngrok/Cloudflare Tunnel alternatives and other tunneling software and services. Focus on self-hosting.

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: awesome-foss/awesome-sysadmin
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome open-source sysadmin resources.

item.title: advplyr/audiobookshelf
item.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: akhilrex/podgrab
item.description: A self-hosted podcast manager/downloader/archiver tool to download podcast episodes as soon as they become live with an integrated player.

item.title: go-vikunja/vikunja
item.description: Mirror of vikunja from https://code.vikunja.io/api

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: gogs/gogs
item.description: Gogs is a painless self-hosted Git service

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: fossar/selfoss
item.description: multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application

item.title: traderepublic/Cilicon
item.description: 🛠️ Self-Hosted ephemeral macOS CI on Apple Silicon

item.title: Bubka/2FAuth
item.description: A Web app to manage your Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) accounts and generate their security codes

item.title: philips-labs/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: logdyhq/logdy-core
item.description: Web based real-time log viewer. Stream ANY content to a web UI with autogenerated filters. Parse any format with TypeScript.

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.

item.title: givanz/Vvveb
item.description: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

item.title: getmango/Mango
item.description: Mango is a self-hosted manga server and web reader

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.
